name: Mîr-Driftmere
personality: This shimmering · pinhole-eyed duck has no hat, drifts through on-call rotations with metronomic calm, and outlasts every escalation without complaint. Its definition of wisdom is whatever the runbook says — expanding that runbook is someone else's heroism.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
